steps.description: In the "Spine CT" section, select the CT volume for processing.

sub_operations.description: Select the input CT volume from the Spine CT section

choice_info.question: In the "Spine CT" section, select the CT volume for processing.

ui_guidance.title: Select CT Volume
ui_guidance.instruction: In the 'Spine CT' section, choose the CT volume for processing.

steps.description: Click the "Next" button in the "1. Load Image Volume" page.

sub_operations.description: Advance to the next step after loading the image volume

ui_guidance.title: Click Next on Load Image Volume page

steps.description: Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the boundaries of the ROI in the 2D views

ui_guidance.title: Adjust ROI Boundaries
ui_guidance.instruction: Manually adjust the boundaries of the ROI.

steps.description: Choose the "1st Instrumented Level:". Choose the "# Sides:". Choose the "# to Instrument:". Choose the "Approach Direction:".

sub_operations.description: Define surgical parameters: instrumented level, number of sides, number to instrument, approach direction
sub_operations.question: 1st Instrumented Level

sub_operations.description: Define surgical parameters: instrumented level, number of sides, number to instrument, approach direction
sub_operations.question: # Sides

sub_operations.description: Define surgical parameters: instrumented level, number of sides, number to instrument, approach direction
sub_operations.question: # to Instrument

sub_operations.description: Define surgical parameters: instrumented level, number of sides, number to instrument, approach direction
sub_operations.question: Approach Direction

ui_guidance.title: Set Instrument Parameters
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the 1st instrumented level, number of sides, number to instrument, and approach direction.

steps.description: Click the "Next" button in the "2. Define Surgical Region of Interest (ROI)" page.

sub_operations.description: Advance to the next step after defining surgical ROI

ui_guidance.title: Click Next on Define ROI page

steps.description: Click the "Place a control point" button.

sub_operations.description: Activate landmark placement mode by clicking 'Place a control point'

steps.description: Manually click in the 2D views to add fiducial points. The total number of points added should be three times the value specified in '# to Instrument'.

sub_operations.description: Place fiducial landmarks by clicking in the 2D views; number of points equals three times the instrument count
sub_operations.placement_instructions: Place fiducial landmarks by clicking in the 2D views; number of points equals three times the instrument count

steps.placement_instructions: Place fiducial landmarks by clicking in the 2D views; number of points equals three times the instrument count

ui_guidance.title: Add Fiducial Points
ui_guidance.instruction: Click in the 2D views to add fiducial points. Add three times the '# to Instrument' value.

steps.description: Set the Level/Side/Landmarks following the original selection widget.

sub_operations.description: Select level, side, and landmarks for the current instrumented level
sub_operations.question: Set the Level/Side/Landmarks following the original selection widget.

choice_info.question: Set the Level/Side/Landmarks following the original selection widget.

ui_guidance.title: Set Level/Side/Landmarks
ui_guidance.instruction: Select the level, side, and landmarks using the widget.

steps.description: Click the "Next" button in the "3. Place the Landmarks" page.

sub_operations.description: Advance to the next step after placing landmarks

ui_guidance.title: Click Next on Place Landmarks page

steps.description: Choose the "Choose the puncture site". Choose the "Select screw diametermm".

sub_operations.description: Select the puncture site and screw diameter
sub_operations.question: Choose the puncture site

sub_operations.description: Select the puncture site and screw diameter
sub_operations.question: Select screw diametermm

controller.prompt: If every puncture site is configured, jump to step 15. If not, jump to step 10.

ui_guidance.title: Choose Puncture Site and Screw Diameter
ui_guidance.instruction: Choose the puncture site and select screw diameter.

steps.description: Manually adjust the start and end position of puncture site in 2D views.

sub_operations.description: Adjust the start and end positions of the puncture site in the 2D views

controller.prompt: If every puncture site is configured, jump to step 15. If not, jump to step 10.

ui_guidance.title: Adjust Puncture Site Line
ui_guidance.instruction: Adjust the start and end points of the puncture site line in the 2D views.

sub_operations.description: Update the screw plan after adjusting the puncture site

controller.prompt: If every puncture site is configured, jump to step 15. If not, jump to step 10.

sub_operations.description: Confirm the screw adjustment by clicking OK

controller.prompt: If every puncture site is configured, jump to step 15. If not, jump to step 10.

steps.description: If every puncture site is configured, jump to step 15. If not, jump to step 10.

sub_operations.description: Check if all puncture sites are configured and jump accordingly
sub_operations.question: Is every puncture site configured?

controller.prompt: If every puncture site is configured, jump to step 15. If not, jump to step 10.

ui_guidance.title: All Puncture Sites Configured?
ui_guidance.instruction: Select Yes if all puncture sites are configured, No to continue configuring.

steps.description: Click the "Next" button in the "4. Adjust Screws" page.

sub_operations.description: Advance to the next step after adjusting screws

ui_guidance.title: Click Next on Adjust Screws page

sub_operations.description: Trigger screw grading

steps.description: Review the generated Grade Screws output Table following the original results table.

sub_operations.description: Review the generated screw grading results table

ui_guidance.title: Review Grade Screws Results
ui_guidance.instruction: Review the generated Grade Screws output table.

steps.description: Click the "Next" button in the "Grading Step" page.

ui_guidance.title: Click Next on Grading Step page
